member.name: T:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression
member.summary: Provides a parser and scheduler for cron expressions.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a new based on the specified cron expression. It's supported expressions consisting of 5 fields: minute, hour, day of month, month, day of week. If you want to parse non-standard cron expressions use with specified CronFields argument. See more: https://github.com/HangfireIO/Cronos

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.Parse(System.String,Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormat)
member.summary: Constructs a new based on the specified cron expression. It's supported expressions consisting of 5 or 6 fields: second (optional), minute, hour, day of month, month, day of week. See more: https://github.com/HangfireIO/Cronos

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetNextOccurrence(System.DateTime,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates next occurrence starting with (optionally ) in UTC time zone.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetOccurrences(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the list of next occurrences within the given date/time range, including and excluding by default, and UTC time zone. When none of the occurrences found, an empty list is returned.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetNextOccurrence(System.DateTime,System.TimeZoneInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates next occurrence starting with (optionally ) in given

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetOccurrences(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.TimeZoneInfo,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the list of next occurrences within the given date/time range, including and excluding by default, and specified time zone. When none of the occurrences found, an empty list is returned.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetNextOccurrence(System.DateTimeOffset,System.TimeZoneInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates next occurrence starting with (optionally ) in given

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetOccurrences(System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.TimeZoneInfo,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the list of occurrences within the given date/time offset range, including and excluding by default. When none of the occurrences found, an empty list is returned.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.Equals(Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified is equal to the current .
member.param: The to compare with the current .
member.returns: true if the specified is equal to the current ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified is equal to this instance.
member.param: The to compare with this instance.
member.returns: true if the specified is equal to this instance; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this instance.
member.returns: A hash code for this instance, suitable for use in hashing algorithms and data structures like a hash table.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.op_Equality(Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression,Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression)
member.summary: Implements the operator ==.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression.op_Inequality(Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression,Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronExpression)
member.summary: Implements the operator !=.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormat
member.summary: Defines the cron format options that customize string parsing for .

member.name: F:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormat.Standard
member.summary: Parsing string must contain only 5 fields: minute, hour, day of month, month, day of week.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormat.IncludeSeconds
member.summary: Second field must be specified in parsing string.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormatException
member.summary: Represents an exception that's thrown, when invalid Cron expression is given.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Cronos.CronFormatException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the given message.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron
member.summary: Helper class that provides common values for the cron expressions.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Minutely
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every minute.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Minutely(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every Nth minute.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Hourly
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every hour at the first minute.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Hourly(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every hour at the specified minute.
member.param: The minute in which the schedule will be activated (0-59).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Daily
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every day at 00:00 UTC.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Daily(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every day at the first minute of the specified hour in UTC.
member.param: The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Daily(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every day at the specified hour and minute in UTC.
member.param: The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).
The minute in which the schedule will be activated (0-59).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Weekly
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every week at Monday, 00:00 UTC.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Weekly(System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every week at 00:00 UTC of the specified day of the week.
member.param: The day of week in which the schedule will be activated.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Weekly(System.DayOfWeek,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every week at the first minute of the specified day of week and hour in UTC.
member.param: The day of week in which the schedule will be activated.
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Weekly(System.DayOfWeek,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every week at the specified day of week, hour and minute in UTC.
member.param: The day of week in which the schedule will be activated.
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).
The minute in which the schedule will be activated (0-59).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Monthly
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every month at 00:00 UTC of the first day of month.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Monthly(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every month at 00:00 UTC of the specified day of month.
member.param: The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Monthly(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every month at the first minute of the specified day of month and hour in UTC.
member.param: The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Monthly(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every month at the specified day of month, hour and minute in UTC.
member.param: The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).
The minute in which the schedule will be activated (0-59).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Yearly
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every year on Jan, 1st at 00:00 UTC.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Yearly(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every year in the first day at 00:00 UTC of the specified month.
member.param: The month in which the schedule will be activated (1-12).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Yearly(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every year at 00:00 UTC of the specified month and day of month.
member.param: The month in which the schedule will be activated (1-12).
The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Yearly(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every year at the first minute of the specified month, day and hour in UTC.
member.param: The month in which the schedule will be activated (1-12).
The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Yearly(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns cron expression that fires every year at the specified month, day, hour and minute in UTC.
member.param: The month in which the schedule will be activated (1-12).
The day of month in which the schedule will be activated (1-31).
The hour in which the schedule will be activated (0-23).
The minute in which the schedule will be activated (0-59).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Extensions.Hosting.Jobs.Cron.Never
member.summary: Returns cron expression that never fires. Specifically 31st of February
